title: Haber2017 (GSE92332) mouse intestine dataset for Besca
author: Sophia Mädler
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Here we used Besca to reprocessed the mouse small intestine single cell transcriptomics dataset  GSE92332  downloaded from GEO. It was originally published by [ Haber et al. Nature. 2017 ] and also used in the best practices paper by [ Luecken & Theis. Mol Syst Biol. 2019 ].
steps_raw: Here we used Besca to reprocessed the mouse small intestine single cell transcriptomics dataset  GSE92332  downloaded from GEO. It was originally published by [ Haber et al. Nature. 2017 ] and also used in the best practices paper by [ Luecken & Theis. Mol Syst Biol. 2019 ].
